## Source: amazon-inspector (3e5df89180b140f5106db0b74f5ee04330236214094173880f7baf0fd47088a8)
The package undicy-lint was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (49c23e1d7e0cb34c37951701004af5b53d9ed82fced58df47554dd6c7eee6213)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'undicy-lint' @ 7.23.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
